zh.Somerleyton, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可索莫利頓
zh.Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine,: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉奧賓-度-帕瓦爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Jernegan於大約1300年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫利頓時，她的父親Peter Jernegan13歲，母親Matilda de Herling20歲。她與Thomas vis de Lou結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉奧賓-度-帕瓦爾享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Jernegan于大约1300年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可索莫利頓时，她的父亲Peter Jernegan13岁，母亲Matilda de Herling20岁。她与Thomas vis de Lou结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉奧賓-度-帕瓦爾享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jernegan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): of uncertain origin. Reaney believes it to be of Breton origin, probably identical with the Old Breton personal name Iarnuuocon ‘iron famous’, taken to East Anglia by Bretons at the time of the Norman Conquest. Compare Journigan .
History: Thomas Jernigan was granted land at Somerton, VA, in 1668. Many of his descendants were sea captains. His son, also called Thomas, settled on Martha's Vineyard, MA, in 1712.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Jernegan was born about 1300, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter Jernegan, was 13 and her mother, Matilda de Herling, was 20. She married Thomas vis de Lou. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1387, in Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Jernegan est née environ 1300, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Jernegan, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Herling, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas vis de Lou. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Jernegan um 1300 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Jernegan 13 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Herling 20. Sie hat Thomas vis de Lou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jernegan è nata il circa 1300 nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Peter Jernegan, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Herling, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas vis de Lou. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1387, nel Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Jerneganが約1300年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソメルリートンで生まれた時，父Peter Jerneganは13歳，母Matilda de Herlingは20歳であった。Thomas vis de Louと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインサイント-アウビン-ドウ-プエイベイルで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Jernegan(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Jernegan(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Herling(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Thomas vis de Lou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 세인트-오빈-드-파바일에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jernegan nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Jernegan, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Herling, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas vis de Lou. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Jernegan родилась около 1300 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter Jernegan было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Herling, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas vis de Lou. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности сеинт-аубин-ду-павеил, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Jernegan nació aproximadamente 1300, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Jernegan, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Matilda de Herling, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas vis de Lou. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1387, en Saint-Aubin-du-Pavail, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 88 años.
